name: model-router
description: Claude Code discipline layer — model routing, cost tracking, git hygiene, session telemetry, TDD nudge, subagent awareness, PR size gating
author: Christina Cephus

v5_skills.debug_routing: Debug keyword tier — Sonnet minimum for debugging tasks
v5_skills.code_review_routing: Review keyword tier — appropriate model for code review complexity
v5_skills.subagent_tracking: PostToolUse tracks Agent tool spawns and warns on cost
v5_skills.tdd_nudge: Stronger test file coverage warnings for source changes
v5_skills.pr_size_gating: Pre-push diff size warnings with configurable thresholds
v5_skills.smart_compaction: Context growth analysis with targeted /compact recommendations
